title: Smash Water Bottle 450ml - Blue Shark Design
features: STAY HYDRATED-Your child's perfect companion for staying hydrated on the go! This bottle is both durable and lightweight, making it easy to take on all their adventures.

CUTE AND STYLISH DESIGN- Our bottle is sure to turn heads, and the convenient carry handle makes it easy for little hands to carry. With a 450ml capacity, your child will have plenty of water to keep hydrated throughout the day. Recommended children 3+ years

HYGIENIC FLIP TOP LID- is hassle-free, it opens with just one finger, making it perfect for sipping on-the-go. You don't even have to tip your head back when drinking, making it an ideal choice for those who want to stay focused
EASY TO CLEAN- It's wide neck and screw top makes it effortless to fill, clean and empty. It also features a detachable internal straw and fits mosts standard bike and car drink holders.
REUSABLE- Refillable, durable and eco friendly and BPA free. Make the switch to a resuable water bottle and help reduce waste in our oceans.
Not suitable for children under 3 years
description: From the manufacturer Kids Water Bottles ( Ages 3 + Years) How to use Remove all labels/ packaging and wash before use. Before first use wash all parts ( bottle, lid and straw) in warm soapy water. Fill with cold water. Do not fill past thread line. Ensure the silicone seals are in place. Screw on the lid tightly and ensure the flip top sipper lid is pushed down when not drinking. Product Features Flip top sipper lid with straw Lid features carry handle perfect for little hands Leakproof design Easy to Clean Wash all parts in soapy water . Disassemble components and clean throughly after each use. For best results always use a bottle brush and straw brush. Do not use harsh chemical or abrasive cleaners. Do not use in dishwasher Do's and Don'ts Suitable for ages 3+ years Do clean after each use. Do take it with you everyday. Not suitable for hot liquids. Do not use for carbonated drinks or dry ice Do not overfill Do not use in microwave, oven , stove top or freezer Do not use in dishwasher.
